title: Spec Frontmatter Schema
description: Machine-readable traceability metadata for a RuneContext spec markdown file. Schema version 1.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Unknown versions must fail closed.

id.description: Stable spec identifier. Must match the path-relative stem under `specs/` without the `.md` extension.

originating_changes.description: Change IDs that originally promoted this spec into durable project knowledge.

revised_by_changes.description: Later change IDs that revised the spec after its original promotion.
